_comment: Per-era slice of the jmsjmr_unity all_syst production (2026-07-23). Sequential per-era running after the all-era run hit streaming backpressure (dense 87-syst accumulators, client-side merge; workers 177->54). chunksize halved to 25000; worker_merge kept at 4 (worker-side merge memory). Outputs stage into unfold/inputs/zjet/rho/jmsjmr_unity/ as the per-era pkls.
